{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Dornoth Three
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth Three]] has an uninhabited moon.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth Three]] is a populated planet.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I think we could have killed half the population of Dornoth Three, if we hadn’t been careful.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
